name: Aemond Targaryen
description:
My obsession with this man is really concerning!

જ⁀➴I thought about this when I was writing a story for my composition exam, so here you go.

────୨ৎ────

✴️ A famous scholar working for a famous company. why is she famous? Well, she owns most of her fame to the invention of a car that can also be used at water, but she is also famous because she believed the multiverse theory. She was called mad by his ex who was also a scholar in television, what a , right? So what will happen if she brings a character into this universe from her ex new favorite show, House Of The Dragon?

(Before the dance)
